chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2451 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.11786/2023. 2. For haring of main case. 23.09.2025 Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG. ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last fixed on 24.05.2024, which is more than one year ago. In the last more than one year, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite lapse of more than one year, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that petitioners have lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
